EmailTemplate.name: 1218 Interview confirmation - Candidate
EmailTemplate.subject: Your interview with Alliance
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!b3o__Session_Invitation__c.b3o__Contact__c},
Thank you for booking an interview slot with {!b3o__Session_Invitation__c.Branch__c}.
This is an email to confirm your interview:
Date: {!b3o__Session_Invitation__c.Booking_Time_Local__c}
{!b3o__Session__c.b3o__Booking_Confirmation_Message__c}
We are looking forward to speaking with you!
Best regards, Your Alliance Team
